mutation.mimo:
Generate an improved version of code.

You are given a parent solution and one inspiration solution. Mutate the parent
code to improve its score, optionally borrowing ideas from the inspiration.
Output the complete improved code.

paradigm_shift: Analyze the provided Python solutions to identify their underlying algorithmic strategies (e.g., greedy, threshold-based, or discrete logic). Your goal is to engineer a fundamentally different approach that occupies a new "behavioral region" of the solution space. Avoid incremental improvements, parameter tuning, or merging existing techniques. Instead, implement a new logic—such as shifting from discrete counters to continuous ratios or probabilistic modeling—to achieve a higher optimization score while strictly adhering to the specified function signature and problem constraints.
